query: Analyze my EKS cluster's cost efficiency and tell me where I'm wasting money.
Run a cost audit on my production EKS cluster.
How much am I spending on my EKS cluster and where can I save? I need hard numbers.
Score my cluster's cost posture — I need a report for our FinOps review.
Show me which namespaces are spending the most so I can identify waste hotspots.
Do a spending assessment on `data-platform` — break it down by compute, networking, and storage.
What's my biggest cost driver on EKS right now? I want to know where the money is going.
I need to justify optimization work to leadership — run a cost intelligence report with projected savings.
Assess my EKS cluster for cost waste — over-provisioned pods, unused volumes, idle load balancers.
Give me a cost efficiency score for my cluster and prioritize the top savings opportunities.
How should I optimize my EKS costs? What are the recommended patterns for cost efficiency?
Run an operational review on my EKS cluster — check networking, security, observability, and reliability.
What version of EKS am I running and what add-ons are installed?
Is my cluster ready to upgrade from 1.31 to 1.32? Run the upgrade readiness check.
What are the best practices for EKS cost management and Spot instance usage?
How do I set up the EKS MCP server so my AI assistant can query the cluster?
Should we use Karpenter or Managed Node Groups for our new cluster? I need a design recommendation.
Do a full reconnaissance on our EKS environment — compute strategy, IaC tooling, CI/CD pipelines.
